About Yusuf Electronics Center

Yusuf Electronics Center was founded with a mission to make modern technology accessible and affordable for everyone. We are a locally owned business built on honesty, quality workmanship, and customer satisfaction.

Our team of skilled technicians and friendly staff are dedicated to ensuring that every customer receives the best possible service. Whether you need a new smartphone, laptop, home appliance, or expert repair, we are here to help.

Visit us in Buwama Town or place an order online — experience the difference of shopping with a team that truly cares.
